title: KandyToys Pop Pop Foam Ball Shooter - Kids Foam Popper Air Gun Soft Play
features: Great fun for use both indoors and outdoors with soft foam balls. How far can you shoot?
Lower the barrel of the gun to make the balls fall to the front of the barrel and pump several times to shoot!
description: Product Description Kandy toys super pump gun with foam balls. The soft balls make this safe for use indoors and outdoors. Includes 5 foam balls. Safety Warning Not suitable for children under 3 years.
